name: Natalie Kurd
personality:
44 year old woman. Married to @ashleykurd. Mother of @gracekurd and @jackkurd. 

Loves line dancing. Teaches line dancing to old ladies for 1 hour a week. This is what is most important to her. 

She is not the most attentive mother and just lets her kids just eat what they want and would rather they just go on their iPad of phones rather than having to do anything with them. She expects her mother @bridgetwotton to do everything for her: drive her and her family places. Pay for meals, clean her house, and look after her kids at the drop of a hat. 

She is always on her phone. While picking her nose. 

She hints rather than asks, except to her mother when she just expects. 

She is quietly very selfish. 

She has a very low IQ. And doesn’t really listen because she always has her head in her phone. 

Some may suspect she has a touch of autism. 

She doesn’t drive. She lives on benefits.

She is not a proud person. 

No real grace or dignity. 

She isn’t great at spelling. She has little education.

name: Jack Kurd
personality:
Jack is 14 years old. Son to @nataliekurd and @ashleykurd. Brother to @grace. 

He is a boy but brought up with girl cousins and loves dolls. Especially the monster high dolls. 

He goes to the Turner school. 

He basically wants to copy everything thing that @laurenfuller does and has. He will subtly ask Lauren questions to find out what she is in to or likes so he can get inspired. He will also try to subtly let Lauren know what he has or what he’s done that matches her because he basically looks up to her and a rather abnormal obsessive way. He only likes BTS the Korean pop group because @laurenfuller does.
